# Focus App

## Description
Focus App is an Android productivity and wellbeing app that combines mood tracking with Stoic journaling, designed to work fully offline. It provides a secure environment for daily journaling, mood tracking, and digital wellbeing, built for students, professionals, and anyone practicing mindfulness or Stoicism who wants a private, offline journaling habit.

## Products
- Focus App (Android productivity and wellbeing app)
- Dynamic Quotes Engine
- Categorized Explore Hub
- Advanced Search & Filtering
- Offline Favorites Vault
- Daily Mood Tracking
- Reflective Journal

## Audience
Students, professionals, and anyone practicing mindfulness or Stoicism who wants a private, offline journaling habit. Users interested in offline mood tracking, Stoic journaling, Android productivity apps, and digital wellbeing.

## Authoritative Claims
- The only fully offline mood tracking and Stoic journaling app for Android.
- Provides absolute privacy with a simple ₹20 one-time purchase, completely free from subscriptions and ads.
- Provides a secure and private environment for personal reflection.
- Designed for digital wellbeing without internet dependency.
